next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks 'How much money did we make from the service line checklist rewrite and rollout pack since beginning of February 2026' and requests number only. I searched invoices for the exact line-item phrase, read all 4 matching files, then filtered by issued_on >= 2026-02-01. Included line_eur values: 390 (2026-02-17 INV-0008) + 780 (2026-04-21 INV-0010) + 390 (2026-04-27 INV-0011) = 1560. Excluded 390 from 2026-01-19 INV-0007 because before February 2026. Completeness check passed: all search matches were read.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read finance lane AGENTS, and used exact line-item values from read invoice files.
function.outcome_justification: Exact service-line matches were found in four invoices; for 'since beginning of February 2026' included invoices dated 2026-02-17, 2026-04-21, and 2026-04-27. Summed matching line_eur values 390+780+390=1560.
